                                    Electric range
                                     The estimated distance a vehicle can travel on battery power, if the battery is fully charged, as measured in the official laboratory test.                                     Air pollution standard
                                     The international noxious emission standard that this vehicle meets.
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                    Annual tailpipe C02 
                                     Estimated tailpipe carbon dioxide emissions for a vehicle travelling 14,000km per year. 
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                    Fuel lifecycle C02
                                     Estimated carbon dioxide emissions produced per km from the production of the fuel as well as its combustion.                                     Noise data
